title: Add evaluation-task visualization for misclassification category breakdown
description:
## Summary
Add a new evaluation-task visualization that shows the breakdown of misclassification categories at a glance.

## Deliverables
- Add a segmented-bar style visualization in the evaluation task UI for the four-category breakdown.
- Show counts/proportions for `score_configuration_problem`, `information_gap`, `guideline_gap_requires_sme`, and `mechanical_malfunction`.
- Present an overall assessment for whether the evaluation suggests optimization, SME clarification, upstream data remediation, or bug investigation.

## Reuse direction
Build on the existing segmented progress bar / task-stage visual language rather than inventing a wholly separate pattern.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation of evaluation-task misclassification breakdown UI using persisted RCA payload (misclassification_analysis). Scope: segmented category bar + per-category counts + evaluation-level red flags in evaluation detail view.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented evaluation-detail misclassification visualization in dashboard/components/EvaluationTask.tsx. Added RCA category segmented bar (score configuration, information gap, SME guideline gap, mechanical malfunction), per-category counts/percentages, overall assessment mapping by predominant category, and evaluation-level red flag rendering from parameters.root_cause.misclassification_analysis.evaluation_red_flags. Also switched RCA parameter parsing to parseJsonDeep for robust nested JSON parsing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validation: npm --prefix dashboard run build:fast passed after changes. Build completed successfully; only expected local Amplify.configure warnings during static page generation.
